prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with carbohydrate loading and high caloric intake (3500-4000 kcal/day) optimized around a 2-hour morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals/snacks with carbohydrates comprising 60-65% of total calories
Pre-workout meal scheduled 2-3 hours before morning run, post-workout meal within 30-60 minutes after
Total daily caloric intake between 3500-4000 kcal with adequate protein (1.2-1.6g per kg body weight)
All meals are vegetarian and nut-free
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high caloric intake and carbohydrate loading, with specific macronutrient ratios and timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: muscle recovery and strength gains from weightlifting training

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with 4-5 meals optimized for protein distribution (25-35g per meal)
All meals are vegetarian-compliant with no meat, poultry, or fish
Meal timing aligns with training recovery (pre/post-workout nutrition included)
Plan is compact and concise (under 400 words)
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) with dietary restrictions (vegetarian), requiring meal timing optimized for muscle recovery and protein distribution across meals

prompt_inputs.goal: Competition day meal plan for 200m freestyle swimming event at 2 PM, optimizing energy and hydration

solution_criteria: Includes breakfast, lunch, and pre-competition meal timed appropriately before 2 PM event
Emphasizes hydration strategy with specific fluid intake recommendations throughout the day
Features easily digestible, carbohydrate-focused meals suitable for competition day
Balances energy intake to support high-intensity swimming performance without causing gastrointestinal distress
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (professional swimmer) preparing for competition day, emphasizing hydration strategies, digestible meals pre-competition, and energy management across morning/afternoon/evening
